_schema.name: Display name
_schema.headline: One-line credential
_schema.what_they_offer: What builders get from this mentor
_schema.best_fit_for: What kind of build this mentor is best paired with
_schema.expertise_label: Label shown on the card (e.g. AGENT INFRA, MUSIC TECH, GOVERNANCE)
_schema.color: ZAO palette: orange | cyan | gold | pink | zabal
_schema.locked: true if mentor has confirmed; false if tentative
_schema.champion_handle: Farcaster handle of the champion this mentor locked from Phase 1 (null until July)
_schema.champion_build: One-line description of the champion's build (null until July)

mentors.name: Zaal
mentors.headline: Organizer + BetterCallZaal + The ZAO operations
mentors.tagline: Runs the Games. Also a mentor slot in flux - claim a builder if Phase 1 produces a build worth the dedicated time.
mentors.bio: Engineer, builder, and connector in web3/Farcaster/music ecosystem. Runs BetterCallZaal Strategies LLC (the BCZ holding co), hosts COC Concertz, organizes ZABAL Gamez.
mentors.what_they_offer: Direct line into the ZAO ecosystem - intros, context, pattern matching against past builds, infra access.
mentors.best_fit_for: Builds that touch multiple ZAO surfaces at once (music + governance + agents + Farcaster). Generalists who need cross-domain connective tissue.

mentors.name: Chris Dolinski
mentors.headline: Founder of Vini App - ship a real app from a plain-language prompt
mentors.tagline: 15 years building software, now getting non-coders to real, live apps. Best mentor in the room if you have an idea and no code.
mentors.bio: Chris is a 15-year software builder and the founder of Vini App, a Farcaster mini app that turns a plain-language prompt into a real, shippable app. Every Vini app comes with a wallet, hosting, a domain, a brand kit, and its own token that can help fund the app as it grows. He demoed the whole flow live in his ZABAL Gamez session - sign in with a Farcaster wallet or an email, describe the app, and the AI handles the questions, the design, and the build. Standout Vini builds include DGEN Fishing and Farcenoid, a game now live across Farcaster, World App, and Celo.
mentors.what_they_offer: The fastest path from idea to a live app, especially for people who have never written a line of code. Hands-on help with the Vini flow, mini-app distribution across Farcaster / World App / Celo, and the token-funds-the-app model. Ran a July collab specifically to get non-coders building in the hackathon.
mentors.best_fit_for: Builders - especially non-coders and first-time shippers - who have an idea and want a real app live this season, not a prototype. Anyone building a Farcaster mini app or thinking about a token that funds the build.
